title: Canopy Growth Q3 2025 Earnings Call Summary
text: Canopy Growth reported Q3 fiscal 2025 results for the period ending December 31, 2024. Consolidated net revenue: $75 million (down 5% year-over-year, up 8% excluding divestitures). Gross margin: 32% (compared to 36% prior year). Adjusted EBITDA: Loss of $3 million (61% improvement versus last year). Free cash flow: Outflow of $28 million (17% improvement year-over-year). Canada Operations: $41M revenue with medical cannabis up 16% year-over-year at record quarterly revenue. Adult-use down 10% annually but up 15% sequentially. Claybourne infused pre-rolls became #3 in British Columbia and Ontario within six weeks. Canada gross margin: 25% (cash margin: 35%). International Markets: $12M revenue, up 14% year-over-year. European business (Poland/Germany) grew in excess of 70%. Poland continues showing outsized growth with demand exceeding supply. Australia medical cannabis faced increased competitive pressure. Gross margin: 41% (up 100 basis points). Storz & Bickel: $22M revenue, up 19% year-over-year. Strong VENTY premium vaporizer performance. Cash and short-term investments: $178 million. Total debt: $460 million principal.
